Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion To Transfer
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS RONALD BLACKENHORN and STANFORD VENTURE, LLP's Motion To Transfer is denied. Defendants have not met their burden of showing that venue is improper. Venue in San Francisco venue is proper because Stanford Venture Group, LLC-a separate entity-is a defendant in this case and resides in San Francisco. See Hale v. Bohannon (1952) 38 Cal. 2d 458, 472. Defendants did not address Stanford Venture Group, LLC in their moving papers. In addition, paragraph 24 of the complaint alleges that some of the wrongdoing occurred in San Francisco. Plaintiff shall recover $1,500 as reasonable fees pursuant to CCP 396b(b) for opposing this motion, which is without merit given the facts and the law. order signed after hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
